description: EDD test suite for VibeExtract — 10 representative sites spanning the full design-system extraction challenge space

sites.name: Hacker News
sites.notes: Oldest-school UI on the list — no CSS frameworks, pure HTML table layout. Tests whether extractor avoids over-engineering a trivially simple page.

assertions.description: Minimal site uses zero CSS gradients on structural elements
Body text ≤ 14px — hallmark of a dense, table-first layout
AI correctly classifies layout density as compact

sites.name: Stripe Homepage
sites.notes: Stripe is the canonical reference for CSS gradient artistry. Must detect the multi-stop gradient backgrounds on hero + feature sections.

assertions.description: CSS gradients detected on structural elements (the core Stripe visual signature)
Page correctly classified as a marketing landing page
Brand primary is a valid hex color (blue-purple range)

sites.name: Linear Homepage
sites.intent: 极致暗黑模式与发光阴影
sites.notes: Linear's dark mode is a design landmark. Key signals: near-black page background, coloured glow shadows (not just rgba black), tight type scale.

assertions.description: Page background is a dark color — correct dark mode detection
Box-shadows detected on UI components (glow / elevation system)
Site paradigm classified as landing

sites.name: Shadcn UI
sites.intent: 现代组件与 Tailwind 规范
sites.notes: Shadcn is built on Tailwind's 4px grid. The extractor must correctly detect the 4px base unit (not 8px) and classify the site as docs.

assertions.description: Tailwind's 4px base spacing unit correctly detected
Component library correctly classified as docs paradigm
Border radius token (md) is populated (Shadcn uses explicit radius vars)

sites.name: Apple Mac
sites.notes: Apple pages are famous for gigantic display type (60–80px+) and image-driven layouts. The typography extractor must surface steps in the display range.

assertions.description: Typography scale includes a display step ≥ 36px (Apple hero headline range)
Page contains ≥ 5 images (product shots and lifestyle imagery)
Apple uses spacious or comfortable density — never compact

sites.name: Airbnb Homepage
sites.intent: 响应式网格与 Z-index 层级
sites.notes: Airbnb's listing grid is the canonical multi-column responsive card layout. Must detect cards, columns, and e-commerce paradigm.

assertions.description: Card grid detected on the listing page
Card grid has ≥ 3 columns (responsive multi-column layout)
Site paradigm correctly classified as e-commerce

sites.name: GitHub Login
sites.intent: 表单结构与 Focus 状态
sites.notes: A simple focused form page. Tests whether the extractor correctly identifies a login form context, captures border tokens, and classifies as saas-app.

assertions.description: Auth page correctly classified as saas-app
Border color token is a valid hex (input/form borders are explicit)
Button/input border-radius (md) is defined

sites.name: Unsplash
sites.intent: 瀑布流与高保真图片裁切
sites.notes: Unsplash's masonry grid is the definitive test for image-heavy layout detection. Must find ≥ 15 images and classify layout as masonry.

assertions.description: ≥ 15 images detected on the page (photo grid)
Layout type correctly identified as masonry
Card grid structure detected in DOM

sites.name: Vercel Blog
sites.notes: Vercel Blog is a typographically sophisticated content site. Key checks: body size ≥ 16px, ≥ 4 distinct type steps, content-site paradigm.

assertions.description: Body text is ≥ 16px — editorial-grade readability standard
Typography scale has ≥ 4 distinct size steps (H1, H2, body, caption)
Blog correctly classified as content-site paradigm

sites.name: Bilibili Homepage
sites.intent: 高密度 DOM 与复杂浮层
sites.notes: Bilibili is a stress test — 5000+ DOM nodes, heavy JS, popup layers, multiple overlapping z-index contexts. Primary check: no crash. Secondary: card + compact density detection.

assertions.description: Physical extraction completes on high-density DOM without crashing (> 0 type steps extracted)
Video card grid detected despite DOM complexity
High-density UI correctly classified as compact
